overview.zh: 今天的主线是「用数据管人」：从入职体验到绩效校准，越来越多决策要求 HR 拿出可量化的证据。AI 面试合规、员工体验闭环、以及以技能为单位的内部流动，正把 HR 从「事务执行」推向「用指标说话」的业务伙伴角色。
overview.en: Today's thread is running people decisions on data: from onboarding to performance calibration, more calls now demand HR bring quantifiable evidence. AI-interview compliance, closed-loop employee experience, and skills-based internal mobility are pushing HR from task execution toward a metrics-driven business partner.

text.zh: 你无法管理你没有衡量的东西。
text.en: You can't manage what you don't measure.

title.zh: 多地明确 AI 招聘工具须留「人工复核」环节
title.en: Regulators require a human-review step in AI hiring tools

summary.zh: 监管趋势要求算法初筛后必须有人工复核并可解释拒绝理由，HR 需要保留评估留痕与申诉通道。
summary.en: Regulatory trend requires human review after algorithmic screening with explainable rejection reasons; HR must keep assessment audit trails and an appeal channel.

title.zh: 内部人才市场兴起：先内招再外招成新默认
title.en: Internal talent marketplaces rise: fill from within first

summary.zh: 企业搭建内部岗位与项目市场，用技能匹配把现有员工调配到缺口岗位，降低招聘成本并提升留任。
summary.en: Firms build internal role and project marketplaces, matching existing staff to gaps by skill — cutting hiring cost and lifting retention.

title.zh: 入职 90 天体验直接影响一年留任率
title.en: The first-90-day experience drives one-year retention

summary.zh: 研究显示结构化的 30-60-90 天入职计划可显著降低早期离职，关键在明确目标、伙伴制与定期反馈。
summary.en: Studies show a structured 30-60-90 day onboarding plan sharply reduces early attrition; the keys are clear goals, a buddy system, and regular feedback.

title.zh: 绩效校准会成对抗打分偏差的标配
title.en: Calibration sessions become standard against rating bias

summary.zh: 跨团队校准会通过横向比对拉齐评分尺度，减少宽严不一与近因效应，让绩效结果更可比、更可辩护。
summary.en: Cross-team calibration aligns rating scales via side-by-side comparison, reducing leniency gaps and recency bias so results are comparable and defensible.

title.zh: 人效指标进入董事会议程
title.en: Workforce productivity metrics reach the boardroom

summary.zh: 人均营收、关键岗位填补周期、再培训投资回报等指标被要求纳入经营汇报，HR 需具备数据叙事能力。
summary.en: Revenue per employee, time-to-fill for critical roles, and reskilling ROI are now expected in business reviews; HR needs data-storytelling skills.

content.zh: 绩效校准（Calibration）：多位管理者把各自团队成员的评分放在同一张表上横向比对，讨论评分依据并统一尺度，消除「有人手松有人手紧」的系统偏差。核心不是改分数，而是让不同评委对「什么是 3 分、什么是 5 分」形成共识，使结果可比、可解释、可辩护。
content.en: Performance calibration: managers put their teams' ratings on one shared grid, compare side by side, discuss the basis, and align the scale — removing the systematic bias of lenient vs. strict raters. The point isn't changing scores but building consensus on what a '3' vs. a '5' means, making results comparable, explainable, and defensible.

content.zh: 内部人才市场（Internal Talent Marketplace）：把公司内部的空缺岗位、临时项目和轮岗机会做成一个「市场」，用技能标签匹配员工与机会，先内部流动再对外招聘。它把「招人」从默认外求转为盘活存量，降低招聘成本、缩短填补周期，同时给员工成长路径，提升留任。
content.en: Internal talent marketplace: turn internal openings, short projects, and rotations into a 'market' that matches employees to opportunities via skill tags — mobilizing internally before hiring externally. It shifts sourcing from default-external to activating existing talent, cutting cost and time-to-fill while giving people growth paths and boosting retention.

content.zh: 结构化入职（30-60-90 计划）：把新人前三个月拆成三段目标——30 天融入与学习、60 天参与与产出、90 天独立与评估，每段配清晰目标、伙伴制与固定反馈节点。它把「入职」从一次性手续变成可衡量的成长曲线，早期发现问题、显著降低试用期流失。
content.en: Structured onboarding (30-60-90 plan): split a new hire's first three months into staged goals — 30 days to absorb and learn, 60 days to contribute, 90 days to operate independently and be assessed — each with clear goals, a buddy, and fixed feedback checkpoints. It turns onboarding from a one-off formality into a measurable growth curve, surfacing issues early and cutting probation-period attrition.

content.zh: 为下一轮绩效评估准备一次校准会：把 2-3 位管理者的团队评分放进同一张表，挑 3 个「同分不同事实」的案例现场对齐，写下本轮统一的 3 分/5 分行为锚点，发给全体评委。
content.en: Prep one calibration session for the next review cycle: put 2-3 managers' team ratings on one grid, pick 3 'same-score, different-facts' cases to align live, write this cycle's shared 3-vs-5 behavioral anchors, and send them to all raters.

content.zh: 给最近一个空缺岗位做一次「先内招」尝试：列出该岗位所需的 5 项核心技能，在现有员工里找出满足 3 项以上的候选人，主动发起一次内部机会沟通，记录是否可通过短期培训补齐缺口。
content.en: Run a 'fill-from-within-first' test on one recent opening: list the role's 5 core skills, find current staff meeting 3+, start an internal-opportunity conversation, and note whether short training can close the gap.

content.zh: 为下一位新人写一版 30-60-90 天入职计划模板：每阶段列 1 个主目标、2 项关键任务和 1 次反馈会，指定一名入职伙伴，试用后收集新人反馈迭代模板。
content.en: Draft a 30-60-90 day onboarding template for your next hire: one main goal, two key tasks, and one feedback meeting per stage; assign a buddy; then collect the new hire's feedback to iterate the template.
